items.title: Ukrainian Attacks Spur State of Emergency Declaration in Crimea
items.summary: Weeks of intense strikes by Ukraine have rattled everyday life in Crimea to an extent unseen since Russia illegally annexed the peninsula in 2014.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Middlemen offer Iranian oil to Indian refiners after U.S. waiver, sources say
items.summary: NIOC is telling Indian buyers that Iranian crude would be $3 to $4 a barrel cheaper ‌than similar regional grades on a landed basis, they said
